title: [FIRRTL] Cannot use Paths to target port of an extmodule
body:
Minimal reproducer:

```firrtl
FIRRTL version 5.1.0

circuit Test:
  public module Test:
    input clock : Clock
    output foo_port : Path

    inst foo of Foo
    connect foo.clock, clock

    propassign foo_port, path("OMReferenceTarget:~|Foo>clock")

  extmodule Foo:
    input clock : Clock
```

```
firtool example.fir
```

Fails with:

```
firtool: /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/FIRRTLUtils.cpp:866: hw::InnerRefAttr circt::firrtl::getInnerRefTo(const hw::InnerSymTarget &, circt::firrtl::GetNamespaceCallback): Assertion `mod && "must be an operation inside an FModuleOp or port of FModuleOp"' \
failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: build/bin/firtool example.fir
 #0 0x0000000000d822ed llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:804:11
 #1 0x0000000000d827db PrintStackTraceSignalHandler(void*) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:880:1
 #2 0x0000000000d80806 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Signals.cpp:105:5
 #3 0x0000000000d8301d SignalHandler(int, siginfo_t*, void*) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:418:7
 #4 0x00007f7421bc8cf0 __restore_rt (/lib64/libpthread.so.0+0x12cf0)
 #5 0x00007f74205c6acf raise (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x4eacf)
 #6 0x00007f7420599ea5 abort (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x21ea5)
 #7 0x00007f7420599d79 _nl_load_domain.cold.0 (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x21d79)
 #8 0x00007f74205bf426 (/lib64/libc.so.6+0x47426)
 #9 0x00000000020167b5 circt::firrtl::getInnerRefTo(circt::hw::InnerSymTarget const&, llvm::function_ref<circt::hw::InnerSymbolNamespace& (circt::firrtl::FModuleLike)>) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/FIRRTLUtils.cpp:867:59
#10 0x0000000001224c83 (anonymous namespace)::PathTracker::processPathTrackers(circt::firrtl::AnnoTarget const&)::$_6::operator()(circt::firrtl::Annotation) const /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/LowerClasses.cpp:559:11
#11 0x0000000001224aa5 bool llvm::function_ref<bool (circt::firrtl::Annotation)>::callback_fn<(anonymous namespace)::PathTracker::processPathTrackers(circt::firrtl::AnnoTarget const&)::$_6>(long, circt::firrtl::Annotation) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/llvm/include/llv\
m/ADT/STLFunctionalExtras.h:46:5
#12 0x0000000001a957a4 llvm::function_ref<bool (circt::firrtl::Annotation)>::operator()(circt::firrtl::Annotation) const /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/llvm/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/STLFunctionalExtras.h:69:5
#13 0x0000000001a92edd circt::firrtl::AnnotationSet::removeAnnotations(llvm::function_ref<bool (circt::firrtl::Annotation)>) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/FIRRTLAnnotations.cpp:266:31
#14 0x00000000012249ce (anonymous namespace)::PathTracker::processPathTrackers(circt::firrtl::AnnoTarget const&) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/LowerClasses.cpp:702:7
#15 0x0000000001224277 (anonymous namespace)::PathTracker::runOnModule() /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/LowerClasses.cpp:469:18
#16 0x0000000001223b15 (anonymous namespace)::PathTracker::run(circt::firrtl::CircuitOp, circt::firrtl::InstanceGraph&, circt::hw::InnerSymbolNamespaceCollection&, circt::firrtl::HierPathCache&, (anonymous namespace)::PathInfoTable&, mlir::SymbolTable const&, llvm::Dense\
Map<mlir::DistinctAttr, circt::firrtl::FModuleOp, llvm::DenseMapInfo<mlir::DistinctAttr, void>, llvm::detail::DenseMapPair<mlir::DistinctAttr, circt::firrtl::FModuleOp>> const&) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/LowerClasses.cpp:443:26
#17 0x0000000001220fb8 (anonymous namespace)::LowerClassesPass::processPaths(circt::firrtl::InstanceGraph&, circt::hw::InnerSymbolNamespaceCollection&, circt::firrtl::HierPathCache&, (anonymous namespace)::PathInfoTable&, mlir::SymbolTable&) /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/li\
b/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/LowerClasses.cpp:784:14
#18 0x00000000012201aa (anonymous namespace)::LowerClassesPass::runOnOperation() /scratch/verif/mikeu/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/LowerClasses.cpp:858:14
[...]
```

Looks like `getInnerRefTo` an `getOrAddInnerSym` expect to be able to cast to an `FModuleOp` in the port case: https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/39b4aa74af8a4af4bb5a77060c7e63e89d99123b/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/FIRRTLUtils.cpp#L863

We can target instances of extmodules, so it seems reasonable to target ports of extmodules as well. This may be as simple as just casting to FModuleLike, although I haven't yet gone down this path.
